'''鈭歬-t-ng''' ('''kakatang''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:zoologise|zoologise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-t-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zoologise|zoologise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歬-t-ng
|-
! Lemma
| kakatang
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikatang|thikatang]] || [[word:jikatang|jikatang]] || [[word:shikatang|shikatang]] || [[word:kikatang|kikatang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthukatang|thuthukatang]] || [[word:jujukatang|jujukatang]] || [[word:shushukatang|shushukatang]] || [[word:kukukatang|kukukatang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thukatang|thukatang]] || [[word:jukatang|jukatang]] || [[word:shukatang|shukatang]] || [[word:kukatang|kukatang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thukatang|thukatang]] || [[word:jukatang|jukatang]] || [[word:shukatang|shukatang]] || [[word:kukatang|kukatang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thekatang|thekatang]] || [[word:jekatang|jekatang]] || [[word:shekatang|shekatang]] || [[word:kekatang|kekatang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothokatang|thothokatang]] || [[word:jojokatang|jojokatang]] || [[word:shoshokatang|shoshokatang]] || [[word:kokokatang|kokokatang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thokatang|thokatang]] || [[word:jokatang|jokatang]] || [[word:shokatang|shokatang]] || [[word:kokatang|kokatang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thokatang|thokatang]] || [[word:jokatang|jokatang]] || [[word:shokatang|shokatang]] || [[word:kokatang|kokatang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙katang|th忙katang]] || [[word:j忙katang|j忙katang]] || [[word:sh忙katang|sh忙katang]] || [[word:k忙katang|k忙katang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathakatang|thathakatang]] || [[word:jajakatang|jajakatang]] || [[word:shashakatang|shashakatang]] || [[word:kakakatang|kakakatang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thakatang|thakatang]] || [[word:jakatang|jakatang]] || [[word:shakatang|shakatang]] || [[word:kakatang|kakatang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thakatang|thakatang]] || [[word:jakatang|jakatang]] || [[word:shakatang|shakatang]] || [[word:kakatang|kakatang]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shakatang|shakatang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshakatang|goshakatang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishakatang|gokishakatang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shakatangn眉|shakatangn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshakatangnkn眉|goshakatangnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishakatangn眉|gokishakatangn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shakatangsh毛|shakatangsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshakatangnksh毛|goshakatangnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishakatangsh毛|gokishakatangsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakatangro|shakatangro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakatangnkro|goshakatangnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakatangro|gokishakatangro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shakatangmu|shakatangmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakatangnkmu|goshakatangnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakatangmu|gokishakatangmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shakatangsher|shakatangsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshakatangnksher|goshakatangnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishakatangsher|gokishakatangsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shakatang|shakatang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshakatangnkng|goshakatangnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishakatang|gokishakatang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shakatangya|shakatangya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshakatangnkya|goshakatangnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishakatangya|gokishakatangya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shakatangyam|shakatangyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshakatangnkyam|goshakatangnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishakatangyam|gokishakatangyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakatangn眉sh毛|shakatangn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakatangnkn眉sh毛|goshakatangnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakatangn眉sh毛|gokishakatangn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakatangn眉ro|shakatangn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakatangnkn眉ro|goshakatangnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakatangn眉ro|gokishakatangn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakatangn眉mu|shakatangn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakatangnkn眉mu|goshakatangnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakatangn眉mu|gokishakatangn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakatangsh毛n眉|shakatangsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakatangnksh毛n眉|goshakatangnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakatangsh毛n眉|gokishakatangsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakatangsh毛ro|shakatangsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakatangnksh毛ro|goshakatangnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakatangsh毛ro|gokishakatangsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakatangsh毛mu|shakatangsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakatangnksh毛mu|goshakatangnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakatangsh毛mu|gokishakatangsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakatangron眉|shakatangron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakatangnkron眉|goshakatangnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakatangron眉|gokishakatangron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakatangrosh毛|shakatangrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakatangnkrosh毛|goshakatangnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakatangrosh毛|gokishakatangrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakatangromu|shakatangromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakatangnkromu|goshakatangnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakatangromu|gokishakatangromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakatangmun眉|shakatangmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakatangnkmun眉|goshakatangnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakatangmun眉|gokishakatangmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakatangmush毛|shakatangmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakatangnkmush毛|goshakatangnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakatangmush毛|gokishakatangmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakatangmuro|shakatangmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakatangnkmuro|goshakatangnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakatangmuro|gokishakatangmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
